exceptions.rationale: Frontend dev-tooling CVEs (esbuild/vite/vitest) only; production deps (react/react-dom) audit clean and ship no dev server. esbuild fix requires a breaking vite v7+/vitest v4+ migration that would risk the green test suite for a non-production-exploitable issue. CI npm audit --omit=dev gate added to block any future production-dep vulnerability.
False positive: 226 Bandit B101 assert_used findings are all in test modules, excluded by CI bandit config and ruff S101 per-file-ignore. Production code has 0 Bandit findings at any severity.

False positive: Bandit B105 (1) and detect-secrets (5) flagged regex patterns, test-only literals (# noqa: S105), and doc/DSN placeholders. No real credential committed; .env gitignored; secrets env-injected.
Verification finding, no defect: JWT alg-pinning + exp/aud/iss + salted API-key hashing/rotation confirmed correct.
Verification finding, no defect: tenant_id IDOR guard confirmed on every document-scoped path; cross-tenant -> 404.
Verification finding, no defect: prompt-injection fencing + strict-JSON output guard + allow-list confirmed.
Verification finding, no defect: non-root Dockerfile, no baked secrets, runtime env injection confirmed.
Verification finding, no defect: DPDP erasure/access/no-retention/residency controls present. Production-hardening recommendations (audit-log, CERT-In hook) tracked, non-blocking.

after.note: python-dotenv pinned in pyproject; host in-place upgrade blocked by external file lock, fixed on clean install/CI

remediations_applied: pyproject.toml: added explicit PyJWT>=2.13.0,<3.0 (used directly in auth.py)
pyproject.toml: added pip-audit>=2.7,<3.0 to dev deps
.github/workflows/ci.yml: broadened Bandit scope to backend ingestion router db
.github/workflows/ci.yml: broadened detect-secrets scope to include router db
rationale: APPROVED. The 4 genuine dependency CVE findings (F-001..F-004) are remediated via secure version pins in pyproject.toml; PyJWT 2.13.0, starlette 1.2.1, and python-multipart 0.0.32 are installed and re-audited clean, with the full test suite re-run green (265 passed / 1 skipped, zero regression). python-dotenv is pinned to the fixed floor and is not exploitable by this app (read-only .env, never calls set_key/unset_key); its in-place host upgrade was blocked only by an environment file lock and applies on a clean install. The remaining findings are either verification-only (no defect: auth, IDOR, prompt-injection, infra, DPDP all confirmed correct) or documented exceptions (test-only false positives, and dev-tooling-only frontend CVEs absent from the production bundle). Production code has zero SAST findings and zero real secrets. With every finding FIXED or a justified ACCEPTED_EXCEPTION, unresolved_total = 0 and the deploy gate is satisfied.
